one_time_description: Expense portion of investment in Nodin Kitagan Limited Partnerships above book value; wind turbine severely damaged causing partial shutdown of Bow Lake Wind Facility
economic_notes: Operates Bow Lake Wind Farm (60MW, 50% share via Mukwaa Inc.), Goulais Wind Farm (25MW, 49% share via 2419656 Ontario Inc.), rooftop solar projects in Ontario via GBG-BFN LP and Zaagate Giizis Energy Inc., and newly established Batchewana Telecom LP providing internet services to rural underserved areas. Batchewana Band Industries Limited operates an industrial park. COVID-19 pandemic noted as ongoing risk.
notes: Fiscal year 2022 (ended March 31, 2022). Consolidation includes Batchewana First Nation Housing Authority Inc., Mukwaa Inc., 2419656 Ontario Inc., and Batchewana Telecom Holding Inc. Eight entities on modified equity basis including wind/solar partnerships. Large capital additions of $13.7M in year mostly construction in progress. Net debt position of -$1,560,987. ISC revenue significantly higher than prior year due to recognition of previously deferred amounts. One wind turbine at Bow Lake severely damaged; full financial impact not determinable at statement date. Expense portion of Nodin Kitagan LP investment above book value of $7.36M is a significant non-cash charge. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC ($23,826,583) + Province of Ontario ($3,323,837) + Government of Canada ($3,020,770) + North Shore Tribal Council ($1,397,784) + Government of Canada Trust Funds ($17,166) + Ontario First Nations LP ($476,234 estimated as government transfer component) — OSR approximated as band enterprises, other revenue less government transfers. Housing expenses estimated as Band Operated Activities Buildings ($861,486) + CMHC ($1,384,722). No remuneration schedule included in extracted text.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
